heading: Special needs adoption programs; public awareness campaign and other activities
label: 254c–7 Special needs adoption programs; public awareness campaign and other activities

children.heading: Special needs adoption awareness campaign
children.label: a Special needs adoption awareness campaign

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The Secretary shall, through making grants to nonprofit private entities, provide for the planning, development, and carrying out of a national campaign to provide information to the public regarding the adoption of children with special needs.

children.heading: Input on planning and development
children.label: 2 Input on planning and development
children.text: In providing for the planning and development of the national campaign under paragraph (1), the Secretary shall provide for input from a number and variety of adoption organizations throughout the States in order that the full national diversity of interests among adoption organizations is represented in the planning and development of the campaign.

children.label: A
children.text: The campaign shall be directed at various populations, taking into account as appropriate differences among geographic regions, and shall be carried out in the language and cultural context that is most appropriate to the population involved.

children.label: i
children.text: placing public service announcements on television, radio, and billboards; and

children.label: ii
children.text: providing information through means that the Secretary determines will reach individuals who are most likely to adopt children with special needs.

children.label: C
children.text: The campaign shall provide information on the subsidies and supports that are available to individuals regarding the adoption of children with special needs.

children.label: D
children.text: The Secretary may provide that the placement of public service announcements, and the dissemination of brochures and other materials, is subject to review by the Secretary.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: With respect to the costs of the activities to be carried out by an entity pursuant to paragraph (1), a condition for the receipt of a grant under such paragraph is that the entity agree to make available (directly or through donations from public or private entities) non-Federal contributions toward such costs in an amount that is not less than 25 percent of such costs.

children.heading: Determination of amount contributed
children.label: B Determination of amount contributed
children.text: Non-Federal contributions under subparagraph (A) may be in cash or in kind, fairly evaluated, including plant, equipment, or services. Amounts provided by the Federal Government, or services assisted or subsidized to any significant extent by the Federal Government, may not be included in determining the amount of such contributions.

A list of national, State, and regional organizations that provide services regarding such adoptions, including exchanges and other information on communicating with the organizations. The list shall represent the full national diversity of adoption organizations.
Information beneficial to individuals who adopt such children, including lists of support groups for adoptive parents and other postadoptive services.
to provide assistance to support groups for adoptive parents, adopted children, and siblings of adopted children; and

children.label: A
children.text: the barriers to completion of the adoption process; and

children.label: B
children.text: those components that lead to favorable long-term outcomes for families that adopt children with special needs.

children.heading: Application for grant
children.label: d Application for grant
children.text: The Secretary may make an award of a grant or contract under this section only if an application for the award is submitted to the Secretary and the application is in such form, is made in such manner, and contains such agreements, assurances, and information as the Secretary determines to be necessary to carry out this section.

children.heading: Funding
children.label: e Funding
children.text: For the purpose of carrying out this section, there are authorized to be appropriated such sums as may be necessary for each of the fiscal years 2001 through 2005.
